cleanupItems.name: Clear Your Personal Temp Files
cleanupItems.desc: Deletes leftover temporary files in your user folder.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Windows Temp Folder
cleanupItems.desc: Deletes temporary files Windows itself created.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Prefetch Files
cleanupItems.desc: Safe to delete - Windows quietly rebuilds these to help apps start faster.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Recent Files List
cleanupItems.desc: Clears the list of recently opened files shown in File Explorer.

cleanupItems.name: Empty Recycle Bin
cleanupItems.desc: Permanently deletes everything currently in the Recycle Bin.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Windows Update Leftovers
cleanupItems.desc: Frees up a lot of space by deleting old, already-installed update files.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Thumbnail Cache
cleanupItems.desc: Clears cached picture previews - Windows regenerates them next time you browse folders.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Internet Cache
cleanupItems.desc: Clears cached web files stored by Windows components.

cleanupItems.name: Flush DNS Cache
cleanupItems.desc: Clears stored website addresses - can fix websites failing to load.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Clipboard
cleanupItems.desc: Empties whatever text or image is currently copied to your clipboard.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Jump Lists
cleanupItems.desc: Clears the recent-file shortcuts that show when you right-click a taskbar icon.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Windows Error Reporting Files
cleanupItems.desc: Deletes old crash and error report files Windows has saved up over time.

cleanupItems.name: Clear Memory Dump Files
cleanupItems.desc: Deletes crash-dump files left behind after a system error - these can be several GB in size.

cleanupItems.name: Rebuild Icon Cache
cleanupItems.desc: Fixes broken, blank, or wrong-looking icons by rebuilding Windows' icon cache.

cleanupItems.name: Rebuild Font Cache
cleanupItems.desc: Fixes fonts that look wrong or fail to display properly by refreshing the font cache.
